scripts.dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently -n vite,electron -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev --workspace=frontend" "wait-on tcp:5173 && electron . --no-sandbox"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run electron:compile
scripts.test: node tests/server.js & sleep 2 && node_modules/.bin/playwright test tests/qa.spec.js; kill %1 2>/dev/null
scripts.test:build: cd frontend && npx vite build && cd .. && npm test
